execution_steps.action: Run git status, git log --oneline -5, and existing runtime validation.
execution_steps.expected_result: Working tree is clean, latest pushed commit is confirmed, and current validation passes before editing.

execution_steps.action: Add the 2026-06-02 08:22 LDD records under records/ldd/2026-06-02/.
execution_steps.expected_result: Portfolio state, strategy state, trigger rules, account review, runtime sync, and pending command records exist.

execution_steps.action: Add portfolio, account-structure, and pending-command schemas while lightly hardening related runtime schemas.
execution_steps.expected_result: All related JSON records can be validated by local schemas without external dependencies.

execution_steps.action: Update INDEX.md and runtime docs to explain records/ as the first real runtime data layer.
execution_steps.expected_result: Documentation distinguishes illustrative examples from real pilot records.
Runtime validation passes and prints coverage summary.

execution_steps.action: Commit with message Add Vol.3 Phase 2 LDD runtime records.
Push once to origin/main and report feedback.
execution_steps.expected_result: Remote main is updated or push failure is reported with recovery context.

preconditions: Use 2026-06-02 08:22 LDD Sync Block as latest source of truth.
validation_steps: Run local runtime validator before editing.
Run local runtime validator after editing.
Confirm git status is clean after commit.
fallback_plan: If push fails, stop editing, confirm local commit hash and branch-ahead state, then run the safe push recovery workflow before recommending the next action.
stop_conditions: Validation fails and cannot be fixed locally.
A newer source-of-truth signal arrives before execution completes.
A requested action would create GitHub Projects, new GitHub Issues, external API connections, or automated trading.
